title: Light Up Numbers 2nd Birthday Decorations for Girls, LED Number Lights Lighted Number Sign for Party Backdrop Wedding Anniversary Remote Wall Table Decor - Cool White & Warm White 2
features: Birthday Party Number Lights: You will receive 1 pieces of white light up number with cool white & warm white LED lights. Light up your birthday party and anniversary! It's a great way to showcase the age or milestone being celebrated. Light up numbers for party are also a great gifts for girls or women.

Two Colors Light Up Numbers: Choose warm white for cozy elegance or cool white for vibrant energy, both color designed with a mesmerizing flash mode to light up your mood. White decorative number lights with simple design can complement any color palette and any theme for your party

Remote Control Number Sign: Easily control the light colors, lighting modes and on/off functions with the remote. Choose one or change the mode every now and then for fun. The eye-catching number is perfect for birthday, anniversary, wedding, graduation and any other celebrations.

Wall & Table Decor: With keyhole slot in back, marquee number can be hung on walls. Decorative birthday number designed with flat bottom, which can be placed on the table steadily. Use it to beautify your home, light up your party

Battery Powered: LED marquee number lights is powered by 2 AA batteries(not included). Size approx(H x D): 8.66" x 1.78"（22cm x 4.5cm), each number is designed with different width. Detailed dimension in picture.
description: Product Description Light Up the Special Moments with the LED Letter & Number Lights Spell out any initial or phrase with these fabulous light up letters and numbers! Like I LOVE U, MARRY ME, HOME, HAPPY BIRTHDAY, GRAD 2025, HAPPY 30 and so on. Light up your favorite words for birthday, party, wedding, home and Christmas decor. Two Colors for Your Choice (Warm White & Cool White) Remote Control Marquee Letters and Numbers Lights Dual Lighting Modes: Remote-switch between warm white (cozy romance) and cool white (vibrant energy), both with a twinkling flash mode for instant party vibes. Battery Powered: Need 2 AA batteries(not included) Wall & Table Decor: Hidden hanging holes for walls/doors as wall art; stable base for tables, shelves, or bars as a tabletop centerpiece Make Every Event Unforgettable Birthday Party: Spell the birthday girl/boy name + age (e.g., “EMMA 18”) with pulsating lights. Weddings/Anniversaries: Decorate dessert tables with “Forever” or “Happy Anniversary” in warm white for timeless elegance. Holiday Party : Spell “JOY” “XMAS” for Christmas or “BOO” for Halloween—cool white flicker adds spooky/festive flair. Home Decorations: Spelled ”HOME“ for our new house—warm light makes every night magical Light up Numbers for Birthday Party Decorations
